hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); FILE=$(echo "$INPUT" | grep -o '"file_path"[[:space:]]*:[[:space:]]*"[^"]*"' | head -1 | sed 's/.*"\([^"]*\)"$/\1/'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -q '/specs/'; then echo 'BLOCK: Spec files in specs/ are read-only. Specs are the source of truth.' >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0
if [ -f /Users/ns/workspace/zencoder-homework/package.json ]; then echo '[Reminder] Run /gate-check to verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test'; fi
